LAW AND MOTION 301, THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CTOWNY 888, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES. SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED; PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO POSSESSION PURSUANT TO THE TERMS OF ITS NOTICE. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
